description: A graphic built over a soft-focus stock photograph of two people embracing in an airport terminal, with blurred travelers and ceiling lights behind. One person wears a denim jacket, a face mask, and a shoulder bag and hugs another in a white sleeved top. White sans-serif text on the lower left reads: 'If you self-deport now, you MAY be able to return as an immigrant or visitor someday -' followed by a large serif headline 'the LEGAL way' with 'LEGAL' highlighted in bright green. A dark blue band across the bottom carries the DHS seal and the 'ICE' wordmark on the left and 'Learn more at: ICE.gov/self-deportation' on the right.
notable_text: If you self-deport now, you MAY be able to return as an immigrant or visitor someday - the LEGAL way; Learn more at: ICE.gov/self-deportation
